import json, pathlib
files=[pathlib.Path('articles/2026/03/26/articles.jsonl'), pathlib.Path('articles/2026/03/25/articles.jsonl')]
queries={
'armed_group':['southern Israeli city','Dimona','Arad','Eilat','Beersheba','launched attacks','hours before','IRGC','Revolutionary Guards','Houthis'],
'Paris_app':['Paris bank bombing','attempted bank bombing','recruit him','recruited him','recruited via Telegram','Telegram','Signal','bank bombing'],
'AbuDhabi_company':['significant damage','ADNOC','ADNOC Gas','ADNOC Onshore','Habshan','Bab field','Abu Dhabi','Borouge','TAQA'],
'Leb_journalists':['three Lebanese journalists','Lebanese journalists','journalists killed','Hasbaya','Hasbayya','Alma al-Shaab','Khiam'],
'Jerusalem_worship':['for all religions','worship for all','Palm Sunday','Jerusalem access','access dispute','freedom of worship','all religions'],
'Gulf_plant':['worker killed','plant makes electricity','fresh water','power and water','desalination','Bahrain','Saudi Arabia','Iranian raid'],
'Sudan_aid':['aid disruption','thousands cut off','cut off from aid','North Kordofan','North Darfur','South Kordofan','Blue Nile','White Nile','Sudan']
}
for label,terms in queries.items():
    print('\n###',label)
    hits=[]
    for p in files:
        if not p.exists(): continue
        for line in p.open(errors='ignore'):
            try:a=json.loads(line)
            except: continue
            title=str(a.get('title') or '')
            content=str(a.get('content') or '')
            txt=(title+'\n'+content).lower()
            matched=[t for t in terms if t.lower() in txt]
            if matched:
                # require either a distinctive term or at least 2 hits
                distinct={'southern israeli city','paris bank bombing','attempted bank bombing','significant damage','three lebanese journalists','for all religions','palm sunday','worker killed','plant makes electricity','aid disruption','thousands cut off','cut off from aid'}
                if len(matched)>=2 or any(t.lower() in distinct for t in matched):
                    hits.append((len(matched), p, a.get('date_publish'), a.get('source'), title, matched, content))
    if not hits:
        print('none'); continue
    seen=set(); shown=0
    for score,p,date,src,title,matched,content in sorted(hits,key=lambda x:(-x[0], str(x[2]))):
        key=(date,src,title)
        if key in seen: continue
        seen.add(key); shown+=1
        flat=content.replace('\n',' ')
        idx=0
        for t in matched:
            i=flat.lower().find(t.lower())
            if i>=0: idx=i; break
        print(f'- {date} {src} {title} matched={matched}')
        print(flat[max(0,idx-240):idx+500])
        if shown>=8: break
PY
